BEEP - Gravity Gun Platformer

Navigate BEEP, a small robot, through a treacherous facility filled with deadly hazards. Use your powerful gravity gun to manipulate objects and enemies, solve physics-based puzzles, and platform across dangerous gaps. Reach the exit portal while avoiding lava pits, crushing blocks, and hostile robots. Master the gravity gun to grab, throw, and swing from objects to survive this hardcore platforming challenge.

Arrow Keys (LEFT/RIGHT): Move BEEP left and right | Arrow Key (UP): Jump | Space: Fire gravity gun (hold to grab objects, release to throw) | Z: Pull grabbed objects closer / Push them away (toggle) | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | ENTER: Start game (from start screen) | R: Restart game (return to start screen)
